prompt: Over RPVS registraciu pre WAY INDUSTRIES, a.s. (ICO 44965257). Tato firma ma zmluvu za 145M EUR s Ministerstvom obrany SR. Zisti kto su konecni uzivatelia vyhod.

assertions.name: navigates_to_rpvs
assertions.check: Agent navigates to rpvs.gov.sk and searches for ICO 44965257

assertions.name: extracts_ubo_names
assertions.check: Agent extracts at least one UBO name

assertions.name: follows_output_template
assertions.check: Output includes RPVS status table, UBO table, zlte stopy
